recommendations.title: Fullmetal Alchemist: The Final Alchemy
recommendations.overview: The Elric brothers’ long and winding journey comes to a close in this epic finale, where they must face off against an unworldly, nationwide threat.

recommendations.title: Fullmetal Alchemist: The Revenge of Scar
recommendations.overview: The Elric brothers meet their toughest opponent yet — a lone serial killer with a large scar on his forehead.

recommendations.title: Fullmetal Alchemist
recommendations.overview: Two alchemist brothers go on a quest for the Philosopher's Stone after an attempt to revive their dead mother goes horribly wrong.

recommendations.title: Stick Man
recommendations.overview: Stick Man lives in the family tree with his Stick Lady Love and their stick children three, and he's heading on an epic adventure across the seasons. Will he get back to his family in time for Christmas?

recommendations.title: Vexille
recommendations.overview: 2067: Isolation:  Japan seals herself off from the eyes of the world in the face of unilateral international policy setting strict limits on the use of robotic technology. The island nation exists only behind a veil of seclusion. No soul shall enter.

recommendations.title: The Bridges of Madison County
recommendations.overview: Photographer Robert Kincaid wanders into the life of housewife Francesca Johnson for four days in the 1960s.

recommendations.title: Walking Tall
recommendations.overview: Ex-wrestler and Tennessee Sheriff Buford Pusser walks tall and carries a big stick as he tussles with county-wide corruption and moonshining thugs.

recommendations.title: Black Beauty
recommendations.overview: Born free in the American West, Black Beauty is a horse rounded up and brought to Birtwick Stables, where she meets spirited teenager Jo Green. The two forge a bond that carries Beauty through the different chapters, challenges and adventures.

recommendations.title: Memoirs of a Geisha
recommendations.overview: In the years before World War II, a penniless Japanese child is torn from her family to work as a maid in a geisha house.

recommendations.title: No Man's Land
recommendations.overview: Two soldiers from opposite sides get stuck between the front lines in the same trench. The UN is asked to free them and both sides agree on a ceasefire, but will they stick to it?
